title: Savory Pork Hot Pot
description: A traditional Chinese hot pot dish featuring tender pork and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Prepare the hot pot broth according to the package instructions.
Slice the pork into thin strips.
Heat the sesame oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the pork to the pan and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chili flakes and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Transfer the pork mixture to the hot pot pot and simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve the hot pot with a variety of vegetables, such as bok choy and mushrooms.
Dip the cooked pork and vegetables in the hot pot broth for a flavorful and spicy meal.
